hero.subtitle: The all-in-one learning companion for ages 0–6. Animated stories, musical instruments, spelling games, emotional intelligence — all designed for parent and child to enjoy together. Safe, ad-free, and beautifully calm.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

features.title: Five Ways to
features.subtitle: Stories, music, spelling, numbers, and emotional intelligence — every feature designed for parent-child co-engagement, never overstimulation.
features.listenToSample: Listen to a sample of our original soundtrack:
features.interactiveStoriesDesc: Animated storybooks with gentle movement, professional narration, and read-along text that bring reading to life.
features.interactiveStoriesBack: Over 100 beautifully illustrated stories with word-by-word highlighting, professional voice artists, and calming animations designed by child development experts.
features.musicInstrumentsDesc: Children play real musical instruments — piano, xylophone, drums, guitar, and more — with songs they can practise and perform.
features.musicInstrumentsBack: A full music studio with practice mode, freeplay, and in-story music challenges. Children learn rhythm, melody, and coordination through hands-on play.
features.spellingLiteracyDesc: Word-building games with letter tiles and fill-the-blank challenges woven into engaging stories.
features.spellingLiteracyBack: Story-driven spelling adventures where children build words letter by letter, fill in blanks from word banks, and progress through themed pages — building phonics and vocabulary naturally.
features.emotionalLearningDesc: Interactive games help children recognise, name, and express emotions through themed characters and guided play.
features.emotionalLearningBack: Children explore emotions like joy, sadness, and surprise through animal and fantasy characters, with timed expression activities that build emotional vocabulary and empathy.
features.realWorldBridgeDesc: After every session, the app suggests real-world activities — turning screen time into a springboard for physical play.
features.realWorldBridgeBack: Based on what your child just played, our friendly wombat character suggests activities like building with blocks, drawing, singing together, or outdoor adventures. Screen time becomes a launchpad.
features.screenTimeControlsDesc: Built-in monitoring with gentle alerts and real-world activity suggestions when it's time for a break.
features.screenTimeControlsBack: Set daily limits, receive gentle alerts, and get personalised real-world activity suggestions based on what your child was playing. Screen time becomes mindful, not mindless.
features.numbersAndCountingDesc: Playful counting games that build number sense and early maths skills through interactive challenges.
features.numbersAndCountingBack: Engaging number activities that help children learn to count, recognise quantities, and develop foundational maths skills — all through interactive, story-driven gameplay.
features.originalMusicDesc: Original soundtracks and playful sound effects that children can listen to, play along with, and perform.
features.originalMusicBack: Composed specifically for children, our music is designed to be engaging yet calming. Children don't just listen — they play instruments, follow along, and create their own music.
features.offlineAccessDesc: Download stories and activities to enjoy anywhere — even without an internet connection.
features.offlineAccessBack: Perfect for travel, waiting rooms, or areas with poor connectivity. Download unlimited content with a subscription, including stories, games, and music.

parentGuidance.storyIntro: More than just an app — a complete early learning companion. Stories, music, literacy, and emotional intelligence woven together into calm, beautiful experiences designed for you and your child to share.
parentGuidance.step1Desc: Animated illustrations, professional narration, and read-along text turn every story into an immersive adventure.
parentGuidance.step2Desc: Children spell words, play instruments, explore emotions, and count — all through interactive, story-driven games.
parentGuidance.step3Title: Every session ends with the real world
parentGuidance.step3Desc: Our Real-World Bridge suggests physical activities based on what your child just played — turning screen time into a springboard.
parentGuidance.demoText: Read stories, play instruments, spell words, explore feelings — all in one calm, beautiful app.
parentGuidance.guideSubtitle: earlyroots is designed for parent and child to enjoy together. Every activity encourages shared play, conversation, and connection — never passive screen time.
parentGuidance.activityGuidesDesc: After every session, get personalised suggestions for physical activities, crafts, and games based on what your child just played.
parentGuidance.coPlayDesc: Every experience is built for two. Read together, make music together, play spelling games together — the app works best when you're both engaged.
parentGuidance.ageAppropriateDesc: Content tailored for ages 0–6, with accessibility options for text size and multi-language support across 14 languages.
parentGuidance.discussionPromptsDesc: No aggressive gamification, no addictive mechanics, no ads. Just warm, gentle experiences that respect your child's developing mind.
parentGuidance.makeScreenTime: Screen Time That Leads to Real-World Play
parentGuidance.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of families who've discovered an app that doesn't just entertain — it inspires real-world creativity, movement, and togetherness.
parentGuidance.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

research.title: Built on
research.subtitle: Every feature — from stories to spelling games to music — is grounded in academic research on child development, shaped by feedback from early years educators.
research.literacyResearchDesc: Our read-along text, spelling games, and word-building activities are based on proven early literacy methodologies that support phonemic awareness and reading comprehension.
research.developingMindsDesc: Animation speed, colour palettes, game pacing, and audio levels are calibrated to engage without overstimulating — informed by child development research.
research.healthyScreenTime: Screen Time That Bridges to the Real World
research.healthyScreenTimeDesc: Our screen time controls follow AAP and WHO guidelines, with a unique Real-World Bridge that suggests physical activities after every session.
research.researchFoundation: Built on postgraduate research and real-world feedback from teachers, nursery staff, and parents.
research.smartScreenTimeDesc: We believe parents should be in control. Built-in parental controls with real-world activity suggestions ensure every session ends with inspiration to play offline.
research.setDailyLimits: Set daily time limits per child
research.gentleAlerts: Gentle alerts with real-world activity ideas

testimonials.title: Why Families
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of families who've made earlyroots part of their daily routine.
testimonials.quote1: It's not just stories — my daughter plays instruments, spells words, and explores emotions. And I love that every session ends with a suggestion to go play outside. It's the only app I feel good about.
testimonials.quote2: The spelling games woven into stories are brilliant. My students don't even realise they're learning. And the music instruments keep them engaged in a completely different way to other apps.
testimonials.quote3: We tried dozens of apps. earlyroots is the only one that's truly calm — no flashing, no chaos, no begging for more screen time. The real-world bridge idea is genius.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: What age group is earlyroots designed for?
faq.a1: earlyroots is designed for children aged 0–6 and their parents. Activities span stories, music, spelling, numbers, and emotional learning — all age-appropriate and designed for co-engagement.
faq.a2: Five learning experiences in one app: animated stories with read-along text, musical instruments with songs to practise and perform, spelling and literacy games, numbers and counting activities, and an emotions and feelings explorer. Plus real-world activity suggestions after every session.
faq.q3: What makes earlyroots different from other kids' apps?
faq.a3: Three things: First, it's genuinely calm — no aggressive gamification, no ads, no addictive mechanics. Second, it bridges screen time to the real world with activity suggestions after every session. Third, it's designed for parent-child co-engagement, not solo use.
faq.q4: Is the content safe for children?
faq.a4: Absolutely. COPPA and UK-GDPR compliant, with no ads, no tracking, no in-app purchases, and no external links. Sentry mobile replay is disabled to protect children's privacy. Your child's safety is our priority.
faq.a5: Yes! Download stories, games, and music to enjoy anywhere — perfect for car trips, flights, or areas without internet.
faq.a6: earlyroots supports 14 languages with English as the primary language and full translations across the app. Perfect for multilingual families.
